howItWorks.intro: This game build stat optimizer calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Weighted Allocation
rules.formula: Points = Total x (Priority x Build Bonus) / Sum of All Weighted Priorities
rules.explanation: Each stat gets a share of total points proportional to its priority weight multiplied by the build type bonus.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Min-maxing means minimizing less important stats to maximize your primary stats, creating a highly specialized character build.

faq.q: Is a balanced build ever good?
faq.a: Balanced builds are forgiving for beginners and solo play but are usually outperformed by specialized builds in endgame content.

howWeCalculate.intro: This game build stat optimizer calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
